entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTH THIS AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLEAR AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

SUNNY
LESS HUMID WITH HIGHS AROUND 80
NORTHEAST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
